content_blocks.text:
306 
chapter 10
Highlights of the Calendar API
We just worked through using a few of the fields and 
methods in the Calendar class. This is a big API, 50 
we’re showing only a few of the most common fields 
and methods that you’11 use. Once you get a few of 
these it should be pretty easy to bend the rest of this 
API to your will.
Key Calendar Methods
add(int field, int amount)
 
get(int field)
getInstance()
getTimeInMillis()
roll(int field, boolean up)
set(int field, int value)
set(year, month, day, hour, minute) (all ints)
setTimeInMillis(long millis)
// more...
Adds or subtracts time from the calendar’5 field.
Returns the value of the given calendar field.
Returns this Calendar’5 time in millis, as a long.
Adds or subtracts time without changing larger fields.
Sets the value of a given Calendar field.
A common variety of set to set a complete time.
Sets a Calendar’5 time based on a long milli-time.
Returns a Calendar, you can specify a locale.
Key Calendar Fields
DATE / DAY_OF_MONTH
 
HOUR / HOUR _OF_DAY
 
MILLISECOND
MINUTE
MONTH
YEAR
ZONE_OFFSET
// more...
Get / set the day of month
Get / set the 12 hour or 24 hour value.
Get / set the minute.
Get / set the month.
Get / set the year.
Get / set raw offset of GMT in millis.
Get / set the milliseconds.
Calendar API

full_text:
306 
chapter 10
Highlights of the Calendar API
We just worked through using a few of the fields and 
methods in the Calendar class. This is a big API, 50 
we’re showing only a few of the most common fields 
and methods that you’11 use. Once you get a few of 
these it should be pretty easy to bend the rest of this 
API to your will.
Key Calendar Methods
add(int field, int amount)
 
get(int field)
getInstance()
getTimeInMillis()
roll(int field, boolean up)
set(int field, int value)
set(year, month, day, hour, minute) (all ints)
setTimeInMillis(long millis)
// more...
Adds or subtracts time from the calendar’5 field.
Returns the value of the given calendar field.
Returns this Calendar’5 time in millis, as a long.
Adds or subtracts time without changing larger fields.
Sets the value of a given Calendar field.
A common variety of set to set a complete time.
Sets a Calendar’5 time based on a long milli-time.
Returns a Calendar, you can specify a locale.
Key Calendar Fields
DATE / DAY_OF_MONTH
 
HOUR / HOUR _OF_DAY
 
MILLISECOND
MINUTE
MONTH
YEAR
ZONE_OFFSET
// more...
Get / set the day of month
Get / set the 12 hour or 24 hour value.
Get / set the minute.
Get / set the month.
Get / set the year.
Get / set raw offset of GMT in millis.
Get / set the milliseconds.
